trends.headline: Rhode pocket blush leads the cream-then-powder dual-blush technique on BeautyTok
trends.body: Creators are layering a cream blush for a natural flush and setting it with a coordinating powder for all-day longevity, with Rhode's pocket blush the most-tagged version of the format. Film a 'cream vs. powder vs. both' three-way cheek test, or a 'blush that survives a humid summer day' wear test from morning to night.

metadata.context: Pocket cream blush trending on a layered cream-then-powder application technique for long-wear flush

trends.headline: Cool-tone makeup is back: frosted blue shadow and silver highlighter take over
trends.body: After seasons of warm clean-girl neutrals, creators are pivoting to frosted blue eyeshadows, silver highlighters, and glossy pearly balms for a cooler summer look. Film a 'recreating the cool-tone trend on warm undertones' tutorial, or a 'one cool-toned product, five ways' challenge.

metadata.context: Cool-tone makeup palette trending as a shift away from warm clean-girl neutrals

trends.headline: 'Blokette' is FashionTok's sporty-meets-girly summer formula
trends.body: Blokette refuses to pick a lane — pairing breezy jersey or sporty tops with skirts, bows, and comfortable flats so you can be athletic and feminine at once. Film a 'styling one tennis skirt sporty AND girly' split, or a 'blokette outfit for every summer plan' lookbook from errands to brunch.

metadata.context: Sporty-meets-girly aesthetic giving creators a clear mix-and-match styling theme for summer outfit content

trends.headline: Layered tees revive the indie-grunge look for summer
trends.body: Stacking a contrasting tee under another — long-sleeve under short, graphic under plain — is bringing back a modern indie-grunge layering moment that works even in warm weather. Film a 'thrift-flip layered tee haul' or a 'how to layer tees without overheating in summer' styling hack.

metadata.context: Layered-tee styling trending as a modern indie-grunge revival adaptable to summer

trends.headline: Yogurt tiramisu is FoodTok's high-protein dessert of the summer
trends.body: A lighter tiramisu built from thick yogurt, Lotus Biscoff cookies, and coffee is racking up views as a no-bake, protein-friendly dessert creators can assemble on camera. Film a 'viral yogurt tiramisu, no mascarpone' build, or a 'high-protein dessert that tastes like cheating' macro breakdown.

metadata.context: No-bake yogurt-and-Biscoff tiramisu trending as a high-protein, easy-to-film summer dessert

trends.headline: Coconut lime cooler mocktail is summer's breakout zero-proof drink
trends.body: The coconut lime cooler — bright, tropical, and easy to layer for the camera — is one of the fastest-growing mocktails of the season as the no/low-alcohol wave continues. Film a 'making the viral coconut lime cooler at home' recipe, or a 'mocktail vs. cocktail, same glass' side-by-side.

metadata.context: Coconut lime cooler mocktail trending as a tropical, DIY-friendly zero-proof summer drink

trends.headline: The 120-second plank challenge is FitTok's beginner-to-pro test
trends.body: Holding a two-minute plank has become a viral benchmark that's hard enough to feel like an achievement but accessible enough for anyone to attempt and film. Shoot a 'can I hold a 2-minute plank on day 1 vs. day 30' progress edit, or a 'plank with me — real-time' follow-along.

metadata.context: Two-minute plank trending as a simple, filmable fitness benchmark and progress-diary format

trends.headline: The '30 Realistic' challenge is the sustainable fitness trend creators are sticking to
trends.body: Pitched as a softer alternative to extreme wellness challenges, '30 Realistic' asks for two real workouts a week plus 7,500 steps on other days — easy to document and easy to keep. Film a '30 Realistic, week 1 check-in' diary, or a 'why I quit 75 Hard for 30 Realistic' explainer.

metadata.context: Low-pressure fitness challenge trending as a sustainable, document-friendly alternative to extreme programs

trends.headline: Portable mini ACs and ice makers are HomeTok's summer heat must-haves
trends.body: Compact countertop ice makers and portable mini air conditioners are surging as creators show fast, affordable ways to beat a heat wave in small spaces and rentals. Film a 'does the viral $90 mini AC actually cool my room?' test, or a 'summer heat survival kit for renters' roundup.

metadata.context: Portable cooling gadgets trending as affordable heat-wave fixes for small spaces and rentals

trends.headline: MagSafe 3-in-1 charging stations are TechTok's desk-glow-up pick
trends.body: Multifunctional stations that charge phone, watch, and earbuds at once — with MagSafe magnets for perfect alignment — are trending as a clean, cable-free desk upgrade creators love to demo. Film a 'desk setup glow-up under $50' or a 'testing the viral 3-in-1 charger — does the magnet actually hold?' review.

metadata.context: 3-in-1 MagSafe charging stations trending as a cable-free desk-setup upgrade for review content

trends.headline: The Honey Bear straw cup is ParentTok's go-to feeding-milestone product
trends.body: The Honey Bear straw cup keeps trending with parents as the tool that teaches toddlers to drink from a straw, making for satisfying 'first time it clicks' clips. Film a 'teaching my toddler to use a straw with the viral honey bear cup' before/after, or a 'baby products worth the hype vs. not' honest review.

metadata.context: Honey Bear straw cup trending as a feeding-milestone product for before/after parenting content

trends.headline: Designer cat furniture is PetTok's home-decor crossover obsession
trends.body: Cat parents are showing off upholstered cat sofas and decor-friendly furniture that blends into the living room instead of clashing with it — high-engagement reveal content. Film a 'unboxing my cat's $200 sofa — will she actually use it?' test, or a 'pet furniture that doesn't ruin my aesthetic' roundup.

metadata.context: Decor-friendly cat furniture trending as a pet-meets-home-decor reveal format

trends.headline: 'Hidden gem' and small-town escapes are beating big-name destinations on TravelTok
trends.body: Travelers are deliberately swapping over-photographed hotspots for under-the-radar small towns, with #hiddengems up sharply as viewers seek lower prices, fewer crowds, and authenticity. Film a 'skip [famous city], go here instead' dupe-destination video, or a 'cheap small-town summer trip you've never heard of' itinerary.

metadata.context: Under-the-radar 'dupe destination' and small-town travel content trending over big-name hotspots

trends.headline: Beaded jewelry is back and bolder on JewelryTok
trends.body: Beaded bracelets and necklaces are surging again as the 'quiet luxury' minimalism fades and colorful, stackable, statement pieces take over. Film a 'making a summer beaded stack with me' DIY, or a 'styling chunky beaded jewelry with basics' lookbook.

metadata.context: Colorful beaded jewelry trending as bold statement styling replaces quiet-luxury minimalism
